tasks.title: Add embedding cache to skip re-embedding unchanged posts
tasks.description: Store SHA256 hash of post text → embedding mapping in data/embedding_cache/. On re-embed, check cache first. Only embed new/changed posts. Should cut Phase 2 time by 80%+ after first run.

tasks.title: Add CSV export for raw posts and personas
tasks.description: Add `mkt export --format csv --topic X --region Y` command. Exports raw posts with all fields and persona summaries. Useful for Derek to analyze in Excel/Sheets.

tasks.title: Add exponential backoff retry to scrapers
tasks.description: Wrap scraper HTTP calls with retry logic: 3 attempts, exponential backoff 1s/2s/4s. Handle 429/503 gracefully. Add --retries CLI flag. Currently scrapers fail on first transient error.

tasks.title: Add temporal trend analysis to synthesis
tasks.description: Bucket posts by week/month, compute sentiment trend, detect spikes in complaint volume. Add `--temporal` flag to synthesize. Output trend chart data as JSON + ASCII chart in terminal.

tasks.title: Add tqdm progress bars to scrape and embed phases
tasks.description: Add tqdm progress bars to scrape (per-source, per-page) and embed (per-batch). Use `--no-progress` flag for cron/pipe mode. Already have tqdm in deps.

tasks.title: Extend overnight pipeline to multiple topics
tasks.description: Make TOPIC a list in overnight_pipeline.py: ['AlipayHK', 'Octopus', 'WeChat Pay HK', 'FPS']. Run full pipeline per topic. Should 4x our persona coverage overnight.

tasks.title: Improve CLI error messages with suggestions
tasks.description: Catch common errors and suggest fixes: missing API key → 'set DEEPSEEK_API_KEY in .env', no posts → 'try --sources app_store_hk', empty clusters → 'need >50 posts for clustering'.

tasks.title: Add scrape-doctor health monitoring
tasks.description: `mkt doctor` command: test each scraper, report success/failure, last successful scrape timestamp, rate limit status. Outputs JSON + color-coded terminal table. Helps detect broken scrapers before pipeline runs.

completed.title: Add embedding cache to skip re-embedding unchanged posts
Add CSV export for raw posts and personas
Add exponential backoff retry to scrapers
Add temporal trend analysis to synthesis
